hooks.command: python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); f=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''); sys.exit(1 if any(x in f.lower() for x in ['.env','secret','token','credential']) else 0)"
python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); old=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('old_string',''); sys.exit(1 if 'sha256:' in old else 0)"

python3 -c "import sys,json,subprocess; d=json.load(sys.stdin); f=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''); sys.exit(0 if not f.endswith('.py') else subprocess.run(['ruff','check',f,'--quiet'],capture_output=True).returncode)"
